notes: All data sourced from official/verified sources. Fees as of 2026. Salaries from Glassdoor, AmbitionBox, Indeed India 2026. Living costs from Numbeo, GoDigit 2026.

hometown.label: At home / with family during college (no paid PG or rented flat)

tier3_away.label: Tier 3 — living away for college (PG or rent)

tier2.label: Tier 2 city — living away during college

metro.label: Metro city — living away during college

careers.label: Software Engineer (BTech CSE)

education_paths.label: IIT (via JEE Advanced)
education_paths.note: IIT total 4 years ₹8–10L tuition + hostel + mess

coaching_options.label: Kota Coaching (Allen/Resonance/Aakash) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: ₹80,000-1.65L/year fees + ₹13,000/month Kota living

coaching_options.label: Local Coaching (Raipur/Bilaspur) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: ₹25,000-35,000/year local + home/PG stay

coaching_options.label: Online Coaching (Physics Wallah, Unacademy) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: ₹10,000-20,000/year online, stay at home — most economical

coaching_options.label: Self-study + YouTube (PW, Khan Academy) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: Almost free — books + internet. Possible with strong discipline

salary.note: Fresher: ₹3.5-12 LPA. 5 yrs: ₹12-60 LPA. Source: Glassdoor/AmbitionBox India 2026

careers.break_even_note: With online coaching + good state engineering college: Total investment ~₹8-10L. Break-even vs zero investment in ~18-24 months of working. With IIT + Kota coaching: Total ~₹18-22L. Break-even ~3-4 years.
careers.honest_reality: College tier matters enormously. An IITian averages ₹15-20 LPA placement. A Tier-3 private college graduate may struggle at ₹3-4 LPA. Skills and portfolio matter more at mid-career — but the first job is heavily college-dependent.
careers.cg_context: For CG students: NIT Raipur (home state quota rank < 15,000 in JEE) is excellent value. CSVTU-affiliated colleges in Bhilai/Raipur offer decent placement with NTPC/SECL for Civil/Mechanical. Local online coaching + rigorous self-study is now a genuine path.

careers.label: Doctor (MBBS + MD)

education_paths.label: AIIMS / Top Government Medical College
education_paths.note: AIIMS: ₹5,856/year tuition. 5.5 years = almost free. Hostel separate.

education_paths.label: State Government Medical College (RIMS Raipur, CIMS Bilaspur)
Private MBBS (Mid-tier Private Medical College)
education_paths.note: Average private: ₹10-15 LPA × 5.5 years = ₹55-82L tuition alone

education_paths.label: Top Private Deemed University (Manipal, DY Patil, CMC Vellore)
education_paths.probability: NEET qualified + can afford premium fees
education_paths.note: Top private deemed: ₹18-22 LPA × 5.5 years = ₹1 crore+ total

coaching_options.label: Kota NEET Coaching (Allen/Aakash/Resonance) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: ₹1.33-1.42L/year NEET fees + ₹13,000/month Kota living

coaching_options.label: Local NEET Coaching (Raipur) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: ₹35,000-45,000/year local coaching in Raipur

coaching_options.label: Online Coaching (PW NEET, Vedantu NEET) — 2 years
coaching_options.note: ₹15,000-25,000/year online + NTA Abhyas free mock tests

salary.note: Govt hospital MBBS: ₹6-15 LPA. Specialist: ₹20-50 LPA. Super-specialist: ₹50-200 LPA.

careers.break_even_note: Government MBBS: ROI is extraordinary — even with ₹5-7L total cost and 7 years to first salary, the lifetime earning potential is unmatched. Private MBBS with ₹60-100L loan: break-even is 8-12 years post-graduation. Think carefully about private MBBS loan amounts.
careers.honest_reality: The single most important fact about MBBS in India: every 50-point improvement in NEET score can save ₹20-100 lakh in fees. NEET preparation is a direct financial investment, not just an academic one.
careers.cg_context: RIMS Raipur and CIMS Bilaspur are genuine options for NEET rank under 40,000 for CG state quota. BAMS (Ayurveda) from CG government colleges: lower NEET cutoff, lower fees (~₹3-5L total), and government hospital appointments through CGVYAPAM.

careers.label: Chartered Accountant (CA)
careers.prep_label: No entrance exam required — direct registration after Class 12

education_paths.label: CA via ICAI (Foundation → Intermediate → Final)
education_paths.probability: Open to all Commerce/PCM Class 12 students
education_paths.note: ICAI total exam fees: ~₹8,000-15,000 total. Study material free download.

coaching_options.label: CA Coaching Institute (local Bilaspur/Raipur) — 3 years
coaching_options.note: ₹30,000-50,000/year at local CA coaching. Optional — ICAI study material is sufficient.

coaching_options.label: ICAI Official Material + Self Study
coaching_options.note: Free download from icai.org. Most cost-effective path.

coaching_options.label: BCom Parallel (optional college alongside CA)
coaching_options.note: BCom from local college ₹15,000-20,000/year. Many students do this simultaneously.

salary.note: CA freshers: ₹6-15 LPA. 5 yrs: ₹15-30 LPA. Big4 partner level: ₹50-100 LPA.

careers.break_even_note: CA is one of the highest ROI professional qualifications in India. Total investment including coaching: ₹1.5-2.5 lakh (vs ₹50-80L for private MBBS or ₹15-20L for IIT path). Break-even is essentially from Day 1 of qualification.
careers.honest_reality: Pass rate is brutal — CA Final first attempt is 10-15%. Average 4.5-5 years to qualify. During articleship (3 years), you earn ₹2,000-15,000/month stipend. The financial investment is low but the time investment is significant.
careers.cg_context: CA is deeply respected in every CG city. NTPC Korba, SECL, SAIL Bhilai all need CAs. Local articleship in Bilaspur/Korba is completely valid. A qualified CA from CG does not need to move to Mumbai — local practice is viable.

careers.label: Bank PO (IBPS PO / SBI PO)

education_paths.label: Any Graduation + IBPS/SBI PO Exam
education_paths.note: Exam fee: ₹850-1000 per attempt. No separate education cost.

coaching_options.label: Online Banking Coaching (Oliveboard/Adda247/Testbook) — 6-10 months
coaching_options.note: ₹2,000-8,000 for premium mock test series. Free content available.

coaching_options.label: Offline Banking Coaching (local institute) — 6 months
coaching_options.note: ₹15,000-25,000 at local banking coaching in Raipur/Bilaspur

coaching_options.label: Self-study + Free Resources (YouTube: Adda247, Mahendras)
coaching_options.note: Completely free — books + free mock tests on Oliveboard/Testbook

salary.note: IBPS PO in-hand: ₹52,000-58,000/month. SBI PO: ₹58,000-65,000/month. Source: rank1st.in 2026

careers.break_even_note: Banking is the highest ROI exam path for graduates. Total investment: ₹5,000-25,000. First salary: ₹50,000-65,000/month. Break-even: literally within the first month of joining.
careers.honest_reality: Success rate is 0.1-0.2% (40 lakh apply, ~10,000 selected). BUT: if you prepare seriously for 8-12 months with daily mocks, your effective probability is much higher. Multiple attempts are allowed.
careers.cg_context: SBI, Bank of Baroda, Central Bank all have large offices in Bilaspur, Korba and Raipur. A Bank PO job means staying in CG with excellent salary, stability, pension benefits, and deep community respect.

careers.label: SSC CGL (Central Government Job)

education_paths.label: Any Graduation + SSC CGL Exam
education_paths.note: Exam fee: ₹100-200. No education cost beyond graduation.

coaching_options.label: Online SSC Coaching (Wifistudy/KD Campus/Testbook) — 6-10 months
coaching_options.note: ₹3,000-8,000 for mock series + materials. Most content free on YouTube.

coaching_options.label: Offline SSC Coaching (local) — 6 months
coaching_options.note: ₹10,000-20,000 at local SSC coaching centres in Tier 2 cities

salary.note: SSC CGL in-hand: ₹40,000-81,000/month depending on post. Source: mahendras.org 2026

careers.break_even_note: Like Banking — the ROI on SSC CGL preparation is extraordinary. Total investment: ₹6,000-15,000. First in-hand salary: ₹40,000-68,000/month.
careers.honest_reality: 40 lakh+ candidates appear. Success rate 0.1-0.2%. BUT consistent daily preparation of 4-5 hours for 8-12 months dramatically changes your effective odds. Income Tax Inspector and AAO are the most sought-after posts.
careers.cg_context: Income Tax offices, SSC-recruited ASOs, and Auditors serve in Raipur, Bilaspur and Jagdalpur. Staying in CG with a central government pensioned job is completely achievable through SSC CGL.

careers.label: IAS / IPS (UPSC Civil Services)

education_paths.label: Any Graduation + UPSC Preparation
education_paths.note: Exam fee: ₹100. No education qualification required beyond graduation.

coaching_options.label: Delhi Coaching (Vajiram/Vision IAS/Drishti) — 1 year
coaching_options.note: ₹1L coaching + ₹22,000/month Delhi living × 36 months = ₹8.9L

coaching_options.label: Online UPSC Coaching (StudyIQ/Insights/PW) — 3 years
coaching_options.note: ₹10,000/year online coaching. Can prepare from hometown.

coaching_options.label: Self-study from Hometown (books + free online)
coaching_options.note: NCERTs (free), newspapers, YouTube free content. Many toppers self-studied.

coaching_options.label: CGPSC alternative (state civil services — more accessible)
coaching_options.note: CGPSC same prep as UPSC + CG-specific GK. Much more accessible. 200-400 vacancies for CG only.

salary.note: IAS salary ₹75,000-2.5L/month cash. TRUE value: government housing (~₹50,000 equivalent/month), vehicle, staff, pension. Total compensation worth ₹60,000-1.5L/month extra perks.

careers.break_even_note: From hometown with self-study: Investment ₹15,000-30,000 + 3-4 years opportunity cost. ROI is extraordinary if selected — the perks and career impact go far beyond salary. But probability is 0.1%. CGPSC is 10x more accessible with similar preparation.
careers.honest_reality: UPSC CSE selects ~1,000 from 1 million applicants (0.1%). Average successful candidate appears 3.2 times. Average preparation time: 3-4 years. Many do NOT qualify — and those years are lost income opportunity. Have CGPSC or banking as a parallel target.
careers.cg_context: CGPSC Deputy Collector and DSP: total compensation worth ₹70,000-1,20,000/month equivalent with housing and perks. Selects 200-400 from CG only. Same preparation as UPSC. Many IAS aspirants from CG strategically appear for CGPSC first.

careers.label: Data Analyst / Data Science
careers.prep_label: Skills bootcamp (6-12 months) — no entrance exam

education_paths.label: Any Graduation + SQL + Python + Power BI / Tableau
education_paths.probability: Open to any stream graduate with technical aptitude
education_paths.note: No specific degree required. Skills certificate + portfolio > formal degree.

coaching_options.label: Paid Data Analytics Course (upGrad/Simplilearn/Coursera Pro) — 6 months
coaching_options.note: ₹40,000-80,000 for comprehensive paid programme with placement support

coaching_options.label: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate (Coursera) — 6 months
coaching_options.note: ~₹4,000 for 6-month Coursera subscription. Google-recognised certification.

coaching_options.label: Free Self-Study (YouTube + free tools) — 6-12 months
coaching_options.note: 100% free: Alex the Analyst YouTube, Kaggle, Google Colab, free SQL practice on HackerRank

salary.note: Fresher Data Analyst: ₹3.5-6 LPA (Glassdoor 2026 avg: ₹6.6 LPA). Senior: ₹14-22 LPA. MNC senior: ₹25-35 LPA.

careers.break_even_note: With free self-study: Investment = zero. First salary ₹3.5-6 LPA. Break-even = Day 1 of first job. With paid course ₹60,000: Recover in first 2-3 months of working.
careers.honest_reality: India has a shortage of 11 lakh data professionals (NASSCOM 2025). Salaries growing 12-15% annually. BUT: entry-level market is competitive — a portfolio of 3-5 real projects on GitHub is worth more than any certification alone.
careers.cg_context: Data Analyst is 100% remote-friendly. A skilled analyst from Korba earns the same as one in Bengaluru working remotely. This is the career where geography does not matter — only skills matter.

careers.label: Digital Marketing Professional

education_paths.label: Any Degree OR even Class 12 Pass + Certifications
education_paths.probability: Open to all — no entrance exam, no specific degree required
education_paths.note: No formal education requirement. Portfolio and certifications matter most.

coaching_options.label: Premium Digital Marketing Course (NIIT/Manipal/IIDE) — 6 months
coaching_options.note: ₹40,000-1,00,000 for comprehensive course with placement support

coaching_options.label: Google Skillshop + Meta Blueprint (free) + HubSpot Academy (free)
coaching_options.note: 100% FREE. Google Digital Garage, Meta Blueprint, HubSpot all free with certificates

salary.note: Fresher: ₹2-6 LPA. Performance marketers 2-4 yrs: ₹5-18 LPA. Source: amquesteducation.com 2026

careers.break_even_note: With free Google/Meta certifications: Investment = zero. Any income from first freelance client is pure ROI. With ₹60,000 paid course: Recover within 3-6 months of working.
careers.honest_reality: The best digital marketers in India earn ₹25-40 LPA at senior level. BUT entry level is competitive and salaries start low (₹2-3 LPA at agencies). The real income accelerator is freelancing — 5 local clients at ₹10,000/month = ₹50,000/month from anywhere.
careers.cg_context: Businesses in Korba, Bilaspur and Raipur desperately need digital marketing help. A student who learns this skill can freelance locally — hospitals, schools, real estate firms, shops. ₹5,000-25,000/month per client is realistic. Location-independent work.

careers.label: ITI Electrician (Industrial Trade)
careers.prep_label: Class 10 → ITI direct admission (no competitive exam pressure)

education_paths.label: Government ITI (Korba ITI, Bilaspur ITI, CGVYAPAM admission)
education_paths.probability: Class 10 with 45%+ marks — accessible to most students
education_paths.note: Government ITI: almost free. ₹2,000-5,000/year tuition. Stay at home or cheap hostel.

coaching_options.label: No coaching needed — direct ITI admission after Class 10
coaching_options.note: ITI admission is merit-based on Class 10 marks. No competitive exam coaching required.

salary.note: NTPC Korba ITI Electrician: ₹35,000-55,000/month total compensation at mid-career. Private contractor: ₹20,000-40,000/month.

careers.break_even_note: Total investment: ₹10,000-1,25,000. First income from NTPC apprenticeship: ₹8,000-12,000/month stipend. Permanent NTPC employment: ₹25,000-40,000/month CTC. Break-even in 3-6 months of working. This is the highest ROI path in CG for non-exam students.
careers.honest_reality: This is the most underrated career path in Chhattisgarh. Zero glamour, absolute security. NTPC Korba, SECL mines, SAIL Bhilai hire hundreds of ITI electricians every year as permanent employees. Government-level benefits, overtime, and advancement — without any loan or competitive exam pressure.
careers.cg_context: NTPC Korba is literally next door. Government ITI Korba offers Electrician trade. Get an ITI degree → appear for NTPC/SECL apprenticeship → permanent employment. This is the most direct career path available to a student from Korba or Champa.

careers.label: BSc Nursing
careers.prep_label: NEET score required (but much lower cutoff than MBBS)

education_paths.label: Government BSc Nursing College (AIIMS/Government Hospital affiliated)
education_paths.probability: NEET qualified with PCB + reasonable rank
education_paths.note: Government BSc Nursing: ₹20,000-30,000/year tuition. Very affordable.

education_paths.label: Private BSc Nursing College
education_paths.note: Private Nursing: ₹50,000-1,00,000/year. Far cheaper than private MBBS.

coaching_options.label: NEET coaching (same as for MBBS — PCB focused)
coaching_options.note: Local NEET coaching ₹35,000-45,000/year in Raipur. Nursing requires lower NEET rank than MBBS.

salary.note: Govt hospital nurse mid-career: ₹30,000-55,000/month. Private: ₹12,000-25,000/month start. International (UAE/UK/Canada): ₹1.5-5 LPA equivalent monthly.

careers.break_even_note: Government BSc Nursing: total ₹3-4L investment. First government hospital job: ₹25,000-35,000/month. Break-even in under 1 year of working. Extraordinary ROI.
careers.honest_reality: India + international demand for nurses is extremely high. UK, Canada, and Middle East actively recruit Indian nurses with generous salaries. Government hospital nursing in India offers excellent job security and pension.
careers.cg_context: AIIMS Raipur and CIMS Bilaspur constantly need qualified nurses. BSc Nursing from government college in CG → government hospital job is a well-defined, achievable path for PCB students who want healthcare careers without MBBS-level NEET pressure.
